body:
# XYZ v1.0.0

*This is XYZ's first release — a single combined release note covering everything shipped to date across all 12 product areas, every provider integration, and every supporting surface. There are no prior release notes: v1.0.0 is the baseline from which future versioned changes will be tracked.*

---

## Why XYZ

- **Cut your cloud bill across the whole footprint.** Schedule non-prod (dev, staging, QA) off during nights and weekends, and trim prod spend via **337+ audit rules** that surface idle, right-sizing, orphan, and commitment opportunities with evidence-backed current-vs-optimised cost.  
- **One platform for every cloud** — same schedules, same reports, same controls across AWS, GCP, and Azure.  
- **No agent. No cluster deploys.** XYZ talks to your clouds via their own APIs. Connect in under 60 seconds.  
- **Safe by default.** Production-tagged resources are auto-detected. XYZ starts and stops — it never deletes.

---

## What's in v1.0.0

### 1. Schedule anything

- **Visual weekly grid.** Click and drag across a 7-day × time-slot matrix; green = running, red = stopped. Toggle an entire day or time column, or shift-click to fill a range. No cron syntax — XYZ generates it for you.  
- **Dependency-aware resource groups.** Group resources into execution tiers so a database starts before the app server and tears down in reverse.  
- **Per-minute evaluation, idempotent actions, one-time overrides** (`force_on` / `force_off`) with an `expiresAt` for maintenance and incidents.  

Learn more: [Schedules](https://XYZ.com/docs/schedules) · [Resource Groups](https://XYZ.com/docs/resource-groups) · [Overrides](https://XYZ.com/docs/overrides) · [Actions](https://XYZ.com/docs/actions)

---

### 2. Connect & discover across your clouds

**Connect in under a minute, your way.** XYZ offers every mainstream auth method on every provider and renders the exact IAM / role JSON you need — generated live for your selected permission tier.

#### AWS
- Assume-role via CloudFormation one-click  
- IAM user access keys  
- Temporary STS credentials  

#### GCP
- OAuth 2.0 ("Connect with Google")  
- Service account JSON key  

#### Azure
- Service principal or Workload Identity Federation  
- Scope: subscription or Tenant Root Group  

**Additional capabilities:**
- Permission tiers: `read_only` → `read_write` (delta upgrades only)  
- AES-256-GCM credential encryption  
- Full inventory discovery with topology  
- 14-day metrics (CPU, network, disk, memory where available)  
- Bulk start/stop with live polling  
- Filter + drill-down across hierarchy  

Learn more: [Cloud Accounts](https://XYZ.com/docs/cloud-accounts) · [Resources](https://XYZ.com/docs/resources) · [Cloud Support matrix](https://XYZ.com/docs/cloud-support)

---

### 3. See everything on one screen — Architecture

- 3D globe of all regions with resource distribution  
- Inter-region arcs (VPC peering, transit gateways, interconnects)  
- Canvas view with full hierarchy (provider → account → region → VPC/VNet → cluster → node groups)  
- Inline recommendations and metrics on every node  

---

### 4. Find waste, automatically

- **337+ audit rules** (AWS 155 · GCP 75 · Azure 107)  
- Categories: idle, rightsizing, schedule, orphan, compliance, discount, governance  
- Includes 14-day evidence (p95 metrics), cost comparison, and remediation guidance  
- Views: by rule, by resource, flat list  
- One-click share to notification channels  

Learn more: [Recommendations](https://XYZ.com/docs/recommendations)

---

### 5. Auto-tag production

- Predicts `prod`, `staging`, `dev` and `noStop`  
- Confidence scoring (1–100)  
- Human approval required  
- Feeds into showback attribution  

Learn more: [Auto-Tagging](https://XYZ.com/docs/auto-tagging)

---

### 6. Scale on a schedule

- Supports ASG, VMSS, MIG  
- Smart defaults from 14-day metrics  
- Presets: Business Hours, Peak Hours, Weekend Scale-Down  
- Modes: `autopilot`, `recommend`, `monitor`  

Learn more: [VM Autoscaling](https://XYZ.com/docs/vm-autoscaling)

---

### 7. Event Readiness

- 5-step wizard with validation  
- Pre-scale using traffic multiplier or expected requests  
- Automatic rollback after events  
- 9-state lifecycle tracking  

Learn more: [Event Readiness](https://XYZ.com/docs/event-readiness)

---

### 8. Dashboard, Reports & Showback

- Dashboard with 6 widgets  
- Cost forecasting and savings projections  
- Showback by team/tag with reconciliation  
- Multi-currency support  
- Budget tracking with health indicators  
- Cost anomaly detection with root cause breakdown  
- CSV exports matching UI  

Learn more: [Reports](https://XYZ.com/docs/reports)

---

### 9. Stay in control

- Organizations, teams, and role-based access control  
- 16 policy categories with fine-grained permissions  
- Execution history tracking  
- Audit logs with request/response JSON  
- Notifications (Slack, Teams, Email, Google Chat)  
- Preferences: timezone, currency, theme  
- Rate limiting: 100 req/min per org  

Learn more: [Authentication](https://XYZ.com/docs/authentication) · [Users & Teams](https://XYZ.com/docs/users-teams) · [Roles & Permissions](https://XYZ.com/docs/roles-permissions)

---

### 10. AI-native — MCP Server

- 43 read-only MCP tools  
- Streamable HTTP  
- Integrations: Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Windsurf  
- PAT-based authentication  

Learn more: [MCP Server](https://XYZ.com/docs/mcp-server)

---

### 11. API-first — Developer Settings

- 125+ REST endpoints  
- Consistent response format  
- Pagination and retry semantics  
- Personal Access Tokens with flexible expiry  
- OIDC for Azure federation  

Learn more: [API Reference](https://XYZ.com/docs/api-reference)

---

### 12. Industry Playground

- Instant demo (finance, retail, healthcare)  
- Same UI as production  
- Read-only, no persistence  
- No auth required  

---

## Supported clouds & resource types

XYZ discovers everything exposed via cloud inventory APIs across AWS, GCP, and Azure, including compute, databases, storage, networking, analytics, ML, messaging, and container platforms.

### Action tiers

- **Full automation** — direct start/stop  
- **Schedule-aware** — scaling-based control  
- **Inventory** — tracking, cost, and insights  

Parent-child relationships are preserved across all resources.

Full matrix: https://XYZ.com/docs/cloud-support

---

## Getting started

1. Define your optimization goals  
2. Connect your cloud account (read-only supported)  
3. Review discovery summary  

Then create a schedule, attach resources or groups, and automation begins.

👉 Docs: https://XYZ.com/docs/getting-started  
👉 Playground: https://XYZ.com/playground
